required_skills: Test Automation Framework Design and Implementation
Test Case Design and Test Plan Authoring
Defect Lifecycle Management and Bug Triage
Continuous Testing Integration in CI/CD Pipelines
Regression Testing Strategy and Suite Maintenance
preferred_skills: Mobile Application Testing on Android and iOS
Security Testing and OWASP Vulnerability Scanning
Accessibility Testing and WCAG Compliance Validation
Test Data Management and Synthetic Data Generation
responsibilities: Design and implement scalable test automation frameworks using Playwright or Selenium that cover UI, API, and integration test layers with maintainable page object models
Develop comprehensive test plans, test case repositories, and traceability matrices that map test coverage to product requirements and acceptance criteria
Integrate automated test suites into CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Jenkins to enforce quality gates that block deployments on critical test failures
Conduct API contract and functional testing using Postman and RestAssured to validate request-response schemas, error codes, and edge case handling across service boundaries
Execute performance and load testing using JMeter or k6 to identify throughput bottlenecks, memory leaks, and degradation patterns under simulated peak traffic conditions
Lead defect triage sessions by reproducing bugs, documenting reproduction steps with severity classification, and tracking resolution through closure in Jira and TestRail
Implement behavior-driven development test scenarios using Cucumber with Gherkin syntax to align automated tests with business-readable acceptance criteria
Perform cross-browser and cross-device compatibility testing on BrowserStack to validate consistent UI behavior across all supported browsers, operating systems, and screen sizes
Conduct exploratory and regression testing for new feature releases, identifying edge cases and negative test scenarios that automated suites do not yet cover
Mentor developers on shift-left testing practices including unit test coverage standards, mock design patterns, and test pyramid principles to reduce defect escape rates
